title: Boom!
body:
![Boom Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e49e823fb44f4f9cf0907b83c131b600417a42bb.png) ![Boom Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/540d135faf82a4bdef915eb5bebd0a96894eb84b.png) ![Dynamite blows up skeletons (LOL)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc303a792abd7c90fbfe439db0326551a95fe202_0.webp) Current Upgrades: ![Boom Upgrades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8469bb6ae2061290466af8f6a7cad71f95088911.png) **Tier 1:** Base Dynamite **Tier 2:** +1 Gunpowder **Tier 3:** +2 Gunpowder **Tier 4:** +1 Wither Skull **Tier 5:** +2 Wither Skull **Tier 6:** +3 Wither Skull or +1 Nether Star ![Boom Modifiers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/398255f8b87d5295f0ebbe814ffeef103d0f6b74.png)

Flame: Adds fire to explosions.

Light: Flies farther.

Contained: Doesn't break blocks.

Shatter: Breaks more resistant blocks.

Pacified: Doesn't deal mob damage.

Lethal: Deals 2x mob damage.

Dampened: Doesn't deal knockback.

Shockwave: Deals double knockback.

Gentle: Doesn't destroy drops.

Evaporate: Removes water.

Golden: Increases blast radius.

Quickdraw: Throw bombs instantly.

![Boom Hoppers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b76d42d1f80fcc5284eeff18c99e2dac7b54aa74.png) **For Hoppers:** Deposit Bombs to the top of the Demolition Table. Deposit Upgrades and Modifiers to the sides of the Demolition Table. Take Bombs out of the bottom of the Demolition Table. **For Dispensers:** Careful not to have too much fun... you can probably lose a couple of friends over these. ![Boom More](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/255476b905fa0d3b443a451504d7e6c49a758ec4.png) You may use this mod in any modpack. You may not reupload this mod. ![Dynamite Spin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/468f102626762ebf4b32533d0beab164a2a54377.gif)
